title: GitHub Octoverse Report 2024 - AI and Global Developer Community

global_developers.note: More developers joined GitHub than ever before

ai_activity.activity_outside_us: more absolute activity outside the United States
ai_activity.note: 59% surge in contributions to generative AI projects

programming_languages.note: Python overtook JavaScript as most popular language

india.projection: expected to have world's largest developer population by 2028

github_education.note: AI attracting more people to become developers

ai_trends.shift: from large models to smaller, efficient models
ai_trends.focus: new use cases requiring less computational power
ai_trends.open_source: no signs of AI hurting open source with low-quality contributions

developer_behavior.beyond_code_generation: developers going far beyond code generation
developer_behavior.open_source_first_timers: wide-scale interest in AI projects from first-time contributors
developer_behavior.empowered_by_ai: AI helping people learn to write code and build software faster

key_insights: Python overtook JavaScript as top language
India to be largest developer population by 2028
100% YoY growth in Copilot adoption among students/educators
ai_impact_summary: AI is driving unprecedented growth in the global developer community, with significant gains in India, Africa, and Latin America. Python's rise reflects the surge in AI and data science. Developers are going beyond code generation, contributing to open source AI projects at record rates.
